description: A designed promotional graphic for a USCIS digital tool on a pale blue background. Top text in dark/medium blue reads 'The Alien Registration Requirement Determination Tool will help you determine if you need to register.' (the phrase 'Alien Registration Requirement Determination Tool' is bolded). Below is a flat-line illustration of a web browser window with three traffic-light-style dots in its top bar and the DHS seal plus the 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' wordmark in the corner of the browser frame; inside the browser are three interlocking red gear/cog icons (signifying a tool/process). Beneath the browser is the program's logo: a large blue 'ARR' monogram with a red swoosh, captioned 'Alien Registration Requirement.' Clean flat-icon government style. Messaging directs noncitizens/visitors to use the online tool to check whether they must comply with the Alien Registration Requirement; part of the administration's push to enforce registration. Tweet targets visitors to the U.S.
notable_text: The Alien Registration Requirement Determination Tool will help you determine if you need to register. ARR - Alien Registration Requirement
